description: Roberto Carlos, a 68-year-old agricultural worker, was brought to the clinic directly from the fields after a massive organophosphate pesticide exposure. He presents with severe bradycardia (Heart Rate <= 55 bpm). As the attending occupational health physician, complete the toxicological emergency protocol in GNU Health. Configure the system by creating a new Lab Test Type for 'Cholinesterase' (Code: CHOLIN) and a new Medicament/Product for the antidote 'Atropine'. Document the toxic effect of pesticides diagnosis (ICD-10 T60.x) for Roberto Carlos and create a clinical evaluation logging his severe bradycardia (Heart rate <= 55). Order the Cholinesterase lab test, prescribe the Atropine antidote, and schedule a toxicology review appointment for Roberto Carlos exactly 7 to 14 days from today. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
